svg.text: two-tone rim: 34u cream under a 12u ink contour. one flat currentColor region. three features each.
4x INSPECTION (80x128). top: coral on deep space. bottom: GREEN PLAYER ON GREEN TERRAIN.
the cream rim is the whole answer to green-on-green: the fill never has to fight the ground.
3 SPECIES x 4 PLAYER COLORS x 3 BACKGROUNDS, AT 32 TALL (game size)
18 PX AUCTION DOCK BADGE -- same symbols, unmodified
no head crop, no badge pose: the outer silhouette alone (box / wingspan / S) still separates the three species.
MOTION CHECK -- frame 1 / frame 2 pairs at 64 tall, on panel. the delta must be visible in the SILHOUETTE.
